title: Crispy Mediterranean Chickpeas Fritters
description: A spicy and fluffy Mediterranean dish featuring yellow food colouring, these fritters are a nostalgic treat that combines the best of Ayurvedic and Rajasic friendly ingredients, perfect for a snack or light meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, mash the chickpeas using a fork or a potato masher until they are mostly smooth.
Add the chopped onion, minced garlic, yellow food colouring, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and mix well.
Gradually add the flour to the bowl and mix until a thick batter forms.
Add the lemon juice to the bowl and mix until the batter is smooth and fluffy.
Heat about 2-3 inches of oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat until it reaches 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil, about 1/4 cupfuls.
Fry the fritters for about 3-4 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Serve the fritters hot and enjoy.
Repeat the frying process with the remaining batter.
Serve the fritters with your favorite dipping sauce or chutney.
